film.title: Night of the Living Deb
film.overview: After a one night stand Deb wakes up in the middle of a zombie apocalypse.

dialogues.dialogue: I think I'm gonna be sick.  Hi-ooh!  - Longest walk of shame EVER! - No, no! That's not... Nothing happened, we both just passed out.  Nothing happened, we both just passed out.  - I mean, something happened. - I'm sure it did!

The same thing that wiped out the indigenous Wabanaki Indians?  - Wobanaki Indians, Pop. - Wobanaki Indians.  I'm supposed to be proud of you that you wiped out the entire population of our town'?!  You see that? You always go to the negative.  - I'm proud of you. Pop. - Always!

I'm supposed to be proud of you that you wiped out the entire population of our town'?!  You see that? You always go to the negative.  - I'm proud of you. Pop. - Always!  Population or no population.  Oh, come on, relax now, babe. We've got some catching up to do! Hm-hm!

Even as a zombie, his hair is camera perfect!  - Oh, is he coming'? - Uh-huh.  He was always mean to me, but I'm going to do him proud.  - Aaaaaaagh! - Okay, let's... let's go.  Control room's in here. Oh'?
dialogues.cause_raw: doing proud to someone who was mean to them
